accent_strategy.description: One single vermilion status lamp carried as the only hard signal.

dominant_mass_strategy.description: An ultramarine wall of systems massing up the right side like one sealed chamber.

historical_anchor.description: A quiet control bay rendered as the institutional shape of decision-making rather than portraiture.

prompt_overrides.scene_intent: Let the room read as a quiet institutional cliff with human presence reduced to evidence.

reflection_strategy.description: A darkened reflective floor plane that mirrors console energy without literal water.

subject_anchor.description: A quiet control bay reduced to one institutional silhouette with implied human presence.

surreal_breach.description: A hard division line slices through the room like a decision threshold that should not be visible.
